mapper.select:
select code_name ,count(*) AS codeNameCnt from vw_user_auth
where user_code = #{userCode} and code_name != '삭제'
group by code_name

SELECT /* 프로젝트 전체 이슈 */ p.project_code AS projectCode, p.project_name AS projectName, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS newIss, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB2' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS progress, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS solution, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB4' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS returnIss, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB5' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS completion,
/* 내 이슈(담당자 = 나) */ NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB1' AND i.assignee_code = #{userCode} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS myNewIss, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB2' AND i.assignee_code = #{userCode} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS myProgress, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB3' AND i.assignee_code = #{userCode} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS mySolution, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB4' AND i.assignee_code = #{userCode} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS myReturnIss, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB5' AND i.assignee_code = #{userCode} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS myCompletion FROM projects p
JOIN ( SELECT pru.project_code FROM project_role_user pru
WHERE pru.user_code = #{userCode}
UNION
SELECT gpr.project_code FROM "GROUP_MEMBER" gm
JOIN "GR_PRO_ROLE" gpr ON gpr.gr_code = gm.gr_code
WHERE gm.user_code = #{userCode} ) up ON up.project_code = p.project_code
LEFT JOIN issues i ON i.project_code = p.project_code
LEFT JOIN status s ON s.status_code = i.status_code
WHERE p.status = 'OD1'
GROUP BY p.project_code, p.project_name ORDER BY p.project_code

SELECT DISTINCT project_code FROM ( -- 1) 직접 매핑으로 admin SELECT pru.project_code FROM project_role_user pru
JOIN role r ON r.role_code = pru.role_code
WHERE pru.user_code = #{userCode} AND r.admin_ck = 'Y'
UNION
-- 2) 그룹 매핑으로 admin SELECT gpr.project_code FROM "GROUP_MEMBER" gm
JOIN "GR_PRO_ROLE" gpr ON gpr.gr_code = gm.gr_code
JOIN role r ON r.role_code = gpr.role_code
WHERE gm.user_code = #{userCode} AND r.admin_ck = 'Y' )

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( -- 1) 직접 매핑 admin SELECT 1 FROM project_role_user pru
JOIN role r ON r.role_code = pru.role_code
WHERE pru.user_code = #{userCode} AND pru.project_code = #{projectCode} AND r.admin_ck = 'Y'
UNION ALL
-- 2) 그룹 매핑 admin SELECT 1 FROM "GROUP_MEMBER" gm
JOIN "GR_PRO_ROLE" gpr ON gpr.gr_code = gm.gr_code
JOIN role r ON r.role_code = gpr.role_code
WHERE gm.user_code = #{userCode} AND gpr.project_code = #{projectCode} AND r.admin_ck = 'Y' )

SELECT u.user_code AS userCode, u.name AS userName, SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS newIss, SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB2' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS progress, SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS solution, SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB4' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS returnIss, SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB5' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completion, NVL(ROUND(AVG(NVL(i.progress, 0))), 0) AS progressRate
FROM issues i
JOIN status s ON s.status_code = i.status_code
JOIN users u ON u.user_code = i.assignee_code
WHERE i.project_code = #{projectCode}
GROUP BY u.user_code, u.name ORDER BY u.name

SELECT u.user_code AS userCode, u.name AS userName, SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS newIss, SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB2' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS progress, SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS solution, SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB4' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS returnIss, SUM(CASE WHEN s.code_id = 'OB5' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completion, NVL(ROUND(AVG(NVL(i.progress, 0))), 0) AS progressRate
FROM issues i JOIN status s ON s.status_code = i.status_code JOIN users u ON u.user_code = i.assignee_code
WHERE i.project_code = #{projectCode} AND i.assignee_code = #{userCode}
GROUP BY u.user_code, u.name

WITH my_projects AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALIZE */ pru.project_code FROM project_role_user pru WHERE pru.user_code = #{userCode} UNION SELECT /*+ MATERIALIZE */ gpr.project_code FROM "GROUP_MEMBER" gm JOIN "GR_PRO_ROLE" gpr ON gpr.gr_code = gm.gr_code WHERE gm.user_code = #{userCode} ) SELECT NVL( ROUND(SUM(v.plan * v.actual_prog) / NULLIF(SUM(v.plan), 0), 0), 0 ) AS total_actual_prog FROM my_projects mp JOIN projects p ON p.project_code = mp.project_code AND p.status = 'OD1' JOIN VW_PROJECT_PROGRESS v ON v.project_code = mp.project_code

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT i.issue_code AS issueCode, i.title AS title, cp.code_name AS priorityName, cs.code_name AS statusName, i.due_at AS dueAt, NVL(i.updated_at, i.created_at) AS updatedAt, i.progress AS progress FROM issues i
JOIN status s ON s.status_code = i.status_code
LEFT JOIN common_code cp ON cp.code_id = i.priority
LEFT JOIN common_code cs ON cs.code_id = s.code_id
WHERE i.project_code = #{projectCode} AND i.assignee_code = #{userCode} AND s.code_id != 'OB5'
ORDER BY /* 마감일 빠른 순(없으면 뒤로) */ i.due_at NULLS LAST, /* 최근 업데이트 순 */ NVL(i.updated_at, i.created_at) DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT memo_code AS memoCode, user_code AS userCode, TO_CHAR(memo_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS memoDate, content AS content FROM user_memo WHERE user_code = #{userCode} AND memo_date >= TRUNC(TO_DATE(#{fromDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) AND memo_date < TRUNC(TO_DATE(#{toDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))
ORDER BY memo_date ASC

SELECT TO_CHAR(TRUNC(h.dt), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS holiDate, h.holi_nm AS holiName FROM holiday h WHERE h.use_yn = 'Y' AND h.dt >= TRUNC(TO_DATE(#{fromDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) AND h.dt < TRUNC(TO_DATE(#{toDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))
ORDER BY h.dt ASC

SELECT memo_code AS memoCode, user_code AS userCode, TO_CHAR(memo_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS memoDate, content AS content FROM user_memo WHERE user_code = #{userCode} AND memo_date = TRUNC(TO_DATE(#{memoDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))
mapper.insert:
MERGE INTO user_memo t USING ( SELECT #{userCode} AS user_code, TRUNC(TO_DATE(#{memoDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) AS memo_date, #{content} AS content FROM dual ) s ON (t.user_code = s.user_code AND t.memo_date = s.memo_date)
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET t.content = s.content
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (memo_code, user_code, memo_date, content) VALUES ( (SELECT NVL(MAX(memo_code), 0) + 1 FROM user_memo), s.user_code, s.memo_date, s.content )
mapper.select:
SELECT NVL( ROUND(SUM(v.plan * v.actual_prog) / NULLIF(SUM(v.plan), 0), 0), 0 ) AS total_actual_prog FROM VW_PROJECT_PROGRESS v JOIN projects p ON p.project_code = v.project_code AND p.status = 'OD1' WHERE v.project_code IN
#{pc}
